svg.text: • 496. Next Greater Element I — base template
• 503. Next Greater Element II — circular array, run twice
• 739. Daily Temperatures — store distance, not value
• 901. Online Stock Span — dynamic version, span aggregated on pop
• 1019. Next Greater Node in Linked List
• 556. Next Greater Element III — digit-permutation variant
• 84. Largest Rectangle in Histogram — flagship problem
• 85. Maximal Rectangle — 2D, build histogram per row
• 42. Trapping Rain Water — left-max / right-max OR monotonic stack
• 316 / 1081. Remove Duplicate Letters — lex-smallest with character availability
• 402. Remove K Digits — lex-smallest by removing k characters
• 1944. Number of Visible People in a Queue
